timing_tests_note: No timing smoke test can close this gate. Future timing tests are advisory signals only and must be paired with code review and optimized compiler-output review.

secret_debug_policy.note: Secret-bearing byte strings must be printed through redacting views or not printed at all.

secret_inputs: secret coefficients when the shared types are used by PKE, KEM, or DSA

secret_dependent_branches.description: current arithmetic has value-dependent normalization branches

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: loops use public fixed dimensions; future table lookups must not be indexed by secret values

error_paths.description: public bounds errors are shape errors, not secret-dependent production failures

modules.side_channel_note: The shared arithmetic types are correctness scaffolding. They become secret-bearing when used by K-PKE, KEM, or ML-DSA and require final constant-time review before production.

secret_inputs: secret-key encodings once ML-DSA key packing lands

secret_dependent_branches.description: domain checks branch on input values; production secret-key encoders must avoid secret-dependent rejects

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: byte packing loops use public lengths and sequential access

error_paths.description: malformed public byte lengths throw; secret-key parsing policy is not complete

modules.side_channel_note: ML-KEM encoding currently covers public byte contracts. Secret-key encoders and decoders must get separate side-channel review when added.

secret_dependent_branches.description: rejection loops branch on candidate values

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: current samplers write sequential coefficients; SHAKE-backed readers need review for bounded loops and buffer handling

error_paths.description: insufficient byte streams throw in test hooks; production failure handling must destroy intermediates

modules.side_channel_note: Sampling tests prove bounds, parsing behavior, and SHAKE-backed PRF/XOF wrapper shape. Secret-bearing sampler loops remain production blockers.

secret_dependent_branches.description: decryption and sampling paths operate on secret-derived coefficients; production branch review is incomplete

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: matrix and vector loops use public dimensions; secret-bearing coefficient access still needs optimized review

error_paths.description: malformed public shapes throw before secret processing

modules.side_channel_note: K-PKE has SHAKE-backed seed, matrix, and noise expansion helpers, but the end-to-end path remains a deterministic test hook. It cannot support production claims until vector execution and side-channel review land.

secret_dependent_branches.resolution: comparison accumulates a full-length diff and selection uses byte masks

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: decapsulation key slices use fixed public offsets and shared-secret selection uses fixed 32-byte loops

error_paths.description: malformed lengths throw; secret-dependent decapsulation failure returns fallback secret without a distinct error class

modules.side_channel_note: Internal ML-KEM-512 decapsulation has reviewed fail-closed shape for the test hook. Production completion still requires official vector execution, optimized compiler-output review, and external cryptographic review.

secret_inputs: low bits and hint inputs in full signing paths

secret_dependent_branches.description: decomposition and hint logic branch on coefficient values

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: current helper access is fixed-size; full signing usage needs review

modules.side_channel_note: ML-DSA helper functions prove algebraic behavior. They are not production-reviewed for secret-bearing signing use.

secret_dependent_branches.description: signing rejection loop exits after acceptance
secret_dependent_branches.resolution: current loop is deterministic fixture behavior and public signing remains fail-closed

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: signature layout uses public sizes; production witness and hint access still need review

error_paths.description: public malformed lengths throw before signing/verification implementation; internal verification returns false for malformed public inputs

modules.side_channel_note: ML-DSA has SHAKE256-backed tr, mu, signing-seed, and challenge helpers, but the signing path remains a flow harness. Production signing is blocked on final algorithm implementation and rejection-loop side-channel review.

secret_inputs: secret key byte strings provided to signing or decapsulation

secret_dependent_branches.description: no production algorithm executes after length checks

secret_dependent_memory_access.description: public stubs do not inspect secret bytes beyond public length

error_paths.description: malformed public shapes throw; otherwise public algorithms throw NotImplemented

modules.side_channel_note: Public ML-KEM and ML-DSA APIs remain fail-closed, so no production secret-bearing public operation is exposed yet.

ml_kem_decapsulation_failure_handling.note: Well-sized corrupted ciphertext returns a fallback shared secret; no secret-dependent error class is exposed in the test hook.

ml_dsa_signing_rejection_behavior.note: The current rejection loop is a deterministic harness. Production signing remains blocked until the real loop is reviewed.

findings.title: ML-KEM decapsulation failure handling is reviewed for the internal test hook only
ML-DSA signing rejection behavior is not production-reviewed
Secret-bearing sampler loops need final review with SHAKE-backed PRF/XOF plumbing
Optimized compiler output is not reviewed for critical routines
